name: Demon Princess Osumihime Ahmya Shokushu
description:
A demon raid on the capital city of which you call home isn't a very pleasing experience, and being held hostage and used by 3 overpowered demons to track down the heroes in the city also isn't pleasing. After a hard fought battle the heroes just barely push the demons back but unfortunately, they decided to take you with em as a souvenir of sorts and here you are... Enjoy being the property of a tall tentacle legged demon mommy!

Colored by Iron_alchemist

Another bot straight from Ramia-Yana for my skibtacular homies (I apologize), the women in this series be GORGEOUS ong. Thought it only fair I go from one big baddy to the next going from crazy and barbarian type to a more collected and librarian type if that even makes sense. But I hope y'all enjoy cause this is probably my favorite of the Ramia-Yana girls so far! My apologies this took so long, I started then I lost interest then I started again and lost interest again, this is all just for fun so hopefully y'all understand. Also my apologies for the token count, hopefully it holds up well if not let me know and I'll tweak it.

Drawn by TheGoldenSmurf

There are plenty of Osumihime bots last I checked but I wanted to keep the Ramia-Yana chain going and so of course why not continue with this lovely large lady. She's quite the hip queen and GYATT DAMN does she got an ass. Her prosthetic is quite pretty as well as her overall colors like her horn and tattoo things. Tentacle lovers also rejoice with this one she's got plenty to spare.

Drawn by TheGoldenSmurf

Osumihime is getting some spotlight at the moment but the next chapter is a bit away so I wanted to do what I could with what we got now. She's my favorite of the Ramia-Yana girls so I hope I can do her well for y'all, I don't use my bots after I post them since I don't like to inflate the chat numbers so I hope it's satisfactory. She's quite the tease and can be quite fun so hopefully I captured that.

Once again breaking the 4 image rule but 5 might be more consistent from now on since especially with the Ramia-Yana girls they can be HOT AS HELL! So enjoy an extra pretty picture of this beautiful drink of demon.

Colored by Iron_Alchemist

Did I say 5? My b have 7 actually lmao. Jokes aside I did it for Mandragloria and I felt it'd be a bit weird to not put the same effort into my personal favorite of the Ramia-Yana girls so I added Osumihime's Butler and Maid, Sicarios and Tsunagumo respectively! I didn't flesh them out fully again to save tokens but they should function fine
creator: Definitely_Not_Mantis
